resources.string: An error occurred when receiving data.
An error occurred when connecting to the server. \nPlease check your server settings.
An error occurred when receiving data from the server.
An error occurred during Wcf transfer. \n
An error occurred when sending data.
ERP Reference could not be found. Check your settings.
Bluetooth printer name is not specified.
You do not have an active internet connection. Please check your internet settings.
There is no active barcodeText reader in your device.
Customer reference could not be found or an error has occurred.
In the database the receipt(s) occurred while deleting.
Could not connect to server.\nPlease check your server settings.
Connection status could not be found.

WCF error . Result messages 
%1s 
 Send query 
%2s
Material Receipt line has been added!
%1s Quantity not entered for Material Line. Please enter quantity.
%1s Price was not entered for the material line. Please enter a price.
%1s Line Material for Series / Lot Information is not entered. Please Serial / Lot Enter.
Please Select a Reason for Visiting.
Shipment Account is not entered for the Visit!
Your device does not support bluetooth!
User name or password cannot be empty.
There is no data to print.
An error occurred when transferring the products.
Risk Limit %1s is exceeded! Available limit : %2s \n
No defined unit could be found for the material line %1s.
This user is being used in another device!
Customer Due Limit Exceeded By %1s ! Customer Due Limit is %2s
%1s Serial Group Information for Material Line Not Entered. Please enter Serial Group Information.
%1s Variant Not Entered for Material Line. Please Select Variant.
Inventory Quantity Information is not suitable for the material line %1s.
You have non-submitted cabin operations. You need to send data before receiving data.
Working on Server, Please Try Again Later.
You do not have authorization for the company-term to be entered. Check your settings.
You do not have authorization for the business-branch you want to enter. Check your settings.
The information entered is incorrect. Please check your info.
Taxpayer Code can not be empty
Taxpayer Name can not be empty
Begin Date can not be empty
End Date can not be empty
The start date cannot be greater than the end date.
File Number can not be empty
You cannot enter data outside of working hours
You cannot import data outside of working hours
You can not send data outside of working hours
You can not receive reports outside working hours
The number of records to be transferred at a time cannot be less than 0 and more than 10000 .
E-Despatch Driver 1 Identity Number is missing.\n
E-Invoice Serial information must be entered
E-Archive Serial information must be entered
The entered serial group is not available
Wrong File Format Selected. Select File with \".mssettings\" Extension.
You must select at least one transfer status.
You cannot make a new action until you complete your active visit.
You cannot take action without starting an automatic visit record.
Automatically created records cannot be processed.
You cannot log in to the application without selecting an active period.
The promotion line cannot be moved.
No fiche references were found to display in the report.
Enter a description for the return line.
An error occurred while saving the document.
An error occurred when logging in.
No campaigns were found to be applicable.
Current account with code %1s is locked. No transaction can be made.
The customer with title %1s cannot be used for sales and distribution.
There is an overdue debt. Payment must be made to continue the transaction.\nDebt amount: %1s
The stock coded %1s has a negative balance. Negative Balance: -%2s

Your right to view and access products has expired because your subscription to your Logo Mobile Sales solution has expired. You can contact our Logo Business partner with whom you work for subscription renewal.
You can contact your system administrator or the Logo business partner you work with regarding the problem you experience in your product access.
Your subscription period for your Logo Mobile Sales solution will expire on %1s. You can contact our Logo Business partner with whom you work for subscription renewal.
This fiche has no deletion authority.
The sales price for the material with code %1s has been determined below the defined purchase price. (Purchase Price: %2s)!
The sales price for the material with code %1s has been determined below the last purchase price. (Purchase Price: %2s)!
The application cannot be used on a rooted device.
Carrier Company cannot be left blank
The distance you are trading is not within the value range specified in the parameters.
Do you want to reset the settings?
Do you want to delete printers?
Do you want to reset the settings?
Type of service to communicate with the program ERP
Use encrypted key for connection settings
Enter the number of records to be transferred from Server at one time
Select the ending image you want to use.
Select the language option you want to use in the application.
Line Number to Print in Detail
Do Not Show On the Last Page
Click to connect to the printer
Click to connect to the printer
The address of the service you use to communicate with ERP. Örnek 192.168.1.1:8080
Select the starting image you want to use.
The security code you have entered in WCF settings
The number of records to be transferred from Server at one time:
Use App Linking to Demo Server
Access Denied. You can not use this device
Amount could not be zero for selected rows
Application needs to restart to change language
The transaction amount will be charged from your credit card. Do you want to continue?

Your transaction is blocked by the application, since the Automatic Date and Time setting of your mobile operating system is turned off. In order to operate, you need to activate the Automatic Date and Time setting.
You cannot add any more variables.
You did not add product to the list. Do you want to go back?
The product is added to the list.
The product you searched could not be found.
A different unit is already added for the product!
Bluetooth device could not be found.
Your permission is required to use Bluetooth. Do you give permission?
Camera permission is required to scan barcode.
Camera permission is required to take photos.
Campaign will be reapplied because of change you made
Do you want to cancel barcodeText addition?
Do you want to cancel campaign?
Do you want to cancel sales condition?
You cannot cancel the transaction as there are transactions paid online.
As the online payment process is completed, you cannot change the transaction.
Can not connect to the device
Do you want to make the selected orders Deliverable?
Do you want to make the selected orders Undeliverable?
Attract Customers payment after the due date Maturity
Please select the file path to save the log information
Please select the path to save the print information.
To use the Pay and Save process, you must choose one of your Masterpass cards and continue the process.
Collection details not yet added yet
You must comply with the current order on your route!
Do you want to delete the selected?
The notification will be deleted. Do you want to proceed?
Do you want to make the selected orders confirmed
The notification will be saved to be send to selected users. Do you want to proceed?
Make sure you have internet connection
Make sure your location settings are on
Cannot connect to the Server. Please check your internet connection.
Connection key could not be decrypted. You can use panel application to generate the key

Your privacy and rights are important to us. Before using our services, please carefully read and accept all agreements. By reading and accepting the agreements, you can start using our services safely.
The designs to be used could not be retrieved. Check your service settings
Could not read license user count
Unable to read registered user count
No point information is found for this AR/AP.
Customer currency information will be cleared and the screen will be closed. Do you want to continue?

Click location button in the top right to save customer location and save customers to your current location. By clicking on the map or keeping pressed on the map marker, you can select and drop any location on the map. After selecting a location, click Send button in the top right to save or update customer location.
Customer location information could not be saved.
AR/AP Gps information could not be saved. Please check your internet connection.
Location information is already designated for this customer. Do you want to update location information?
Customer reference not found. Please update your data
%1s Coded Customer can not be transferred
The customer was transferred. You need to go back to the customer list.
Customer has unsent %1s documents. Do you continue?
Customer has unsent %1s documents. You can not continue processing!
Are You Sure You Want To Delete All Data?
The documents that you selected will be deleted. Do you continue?
Delete information to three days before
Defined delivery code could not be found.
Number of lines to be printed in detail
Your device does not support this feature
This user is used on another device! Please exit the application and log in again to send and receive data.
There are differences in the posted record. Check the posted record.
Defined discount could not be found.
Do you want to apply campaign?
Do you want to apply sales condition?
The document could not be printed. Check your settings
You do not have any cards registered to your MasterPass account.
The status of the E-Document is not suitable for submission.
The content could not be found.
The content you\'re searching for could not be found.
Before Detail Information should be entered
You can fill only one same form in a day
Please enter your Pin sent as SMS to your device
To verify the phone number of your Masterpass account, enter the verification code sent to your phone via SMS.
To verify your Masterpass account at the merchant, enter the verification code sent to your phone via SMS.
Report query could not be executed !
All products will be deleted and added again. Do you want to continue?
An error occurred when sending work information! Please try again!
Work information could not be sent! System is trying to update…
This record has been posted before. To send again, the record in Erp must be deleted.
Are You Sure That You Want to Delete the Slip?
Slip could not be found in database.
An error occurred when saving the slip.
Slip\'s proposal status is being checked. Please wait.
Slip is not in Proposal status. Slip cannot be edited!
The visit continues for the customer with the title %1s. Would you like to complete the visit and continue the process?
Copyright Proje Danışmanlık ve Bilgisayar Hiz.Ltd.Şti.
Permission would not be requested again for %1s.
Defined price could not be found.
Material name font size of the form
Get The Last Purchase Price Of All Customer
Get The Last Sale Price Of All Customer
Get The Last Purchase Price Of The Customer
Get The Last Sale Price Of The Customer
You can get data like R/P Accounts, Materials etc.
Material prices could not be transferred!
An error occurred when retrieving the data to print.
There is no data to print.
The products are being listed. Please wait.
Material stocks could not be transferred!
An error occurred when receiving user info!
You must purchase license to perform GPS operation.
You have a current survey named %1s. Do you want to participate in the survey?
The ID number must be 11 digits.
Version is used to install a new one for the old is
E-Archive / E-Invoice invoices should be cancelled from ERP
This transaction has been closed by payments. You cannot edit.
Unauthorized copying of that program in its entirety or any portion of, and prosecuted to the maximum extent possible under applicable legal provisions
Lines without quantity will be deleted. Are you sure to continue?
You have a MasterPass account registered in the system. In order to complete your payment using MasterPass, you must associate your card with the merchant.
Your location information has been updated
This sample requires location permission to enable the \\\'my location\' layer. Please try again and grant access to use the location.
To see the customer on the map, you must give location permission.
Location permission is required to find nearby devices.
Location permission is required to see your location on the map.
User name or password cannot be empty.
Quantity cannot be more than the remaining quantity.
Your MasterPass account is not suitable for use
Start value must be less than end value
Matter numbers expired. Please enter new end number
End value must be greater than start value
A new customer is being saved. Please wait.
Could not find printer accessible via service
No application found that can open the PDF file
No conditions found for the product
Sales manager with email address not found
Fiche details not yet added yet
Material line not yet added yet
You do not have permission to edit fiche
You can not go higher than the Distribution Ordinance quantity?
You do not have permission for form entry.
There is not any defined bank.
There is not any defined bank account.
A Barcode Reader Application Could Not Be Found
In distruted rule to be transferred Row Not Found
In order to be transferred Row Not Found
No task is found to send.
You do not have internet connection. Prices will be retrieved from local database.
Information Retrieval Process not transfer yet. You can not continue processing!
You have not selected any campaigns
You can not Sell My Own Task completes Yes Current Account
Do not show the survey again
You can not use Out of Hours
The status of the notification is not suitable for deletion
Be considered of the work hours
Send date shouldn\'t be earlier than today
Entered Quantity Can not Be Greater than Deliverable Quantity
The amount of the created order is below the specified limit
You Are Entering a Past-Dated Check
Defined payment plan could not be found.
Your save path has been cleared. You can select the new save path during the next save process.
Penetration Slip could not be sent
Permission would not be requested again
Location permission is requied for demo
Phone number must be selected for online payments
You must match to select the device. Please click Match button.
Please select the Shipment Account first.
Retrieving Printed Document Number… Please Wait…
Defined design file could not be found.
Updating Printed Document Number… Please Wait…
Printer and design must be selected for printing
To access the printer list, the printer service address must be entered
The printer service could not be accessed. Check your settings and service is running
The printer service address must be entered to continue the process
The price(s) defined for the product could not be found.
Sub-unit(s) of the product could not be found.
Variant(s) of the product could not be found.
Defined project code could not be found.
Do you want to go back?
Is a condition of sale apply to previously applied again?
Do you want to cancel the slip?
Is Change To Line Delivery Dates?
Change warehouse information on fiche lines?
Would you like to delete the old record and add new record?
Distribution Ordinance to be transferred into the Fiche, Are You Sure?
You can not go higher than the ordered quantity?
There is a GPS coordinate for this location. Overwrite ?
Information Retrieval Process not transfer yet. Do you continue?
Do you want to save the slip?
Would you like to transfer daily currency information?
Ordered to be transferred into the Fiche, Are You Sure?
There is a task for this customer. Do you want to view ?
Are you sure you want to cancel?
Do you want to cancel the Transfer Process?
Are you sure uou want to cancel?
Are you sure you want to delete?
Are you sure you want to exit?
Are you sure you want to transfer?
To be able to save pictures, you must give write permission to the disc.
We need your permission for the application to access the phone features on the device.
The receiving operation is running on the service.
The detail has been removed from the list
The product has been removed from the list!
Do you want to remove the picture?
In order to be able to do this, at least one report must have been designed
The report is being prepared. Please wait
Please click the resend button again to receive new SMS.
If you turn back you will lose your information. Do you want to continue?
If you go back, slip will be cancelled. Do you want to cancel?
If you go back, visit will be cancelled. Do you want to cancel?
Select The Type Of Data Transfer
Click here to select a Material
The sum of the selected produ must be X.
An error occurred when sending the slip!
You can send sales activity data like Orders, Invoice, Cash Fiche
An error occurred when sending visit information!
You must have at least 3 stocks with serial number to make ranged selection!
Your session is terminated since you\'ve been idle for a long while. Please login again.
Company language must be specified. Please reenter.
Company language info. TRTR for Turkish
Company number format is wrong. Please reenter.
Address must be specified. Please enter your address info.
Collections linked with receipts must be saved before leaving the page
Show the top info on all pages
Only Show Customers That Are Close To Me
Defined auxiliary code could not be found.
The start date should be earlier than the end date
Start km cannot be greater than End km.
Unable to get available stock quantity information because there is no internet connection.
The amount of surplus cannot exceed the amount entered
Please select the LOGO application you use. Tiger - GO / j-platform
Task information is in the attachment.
An error occurred when sending task info!
Defined trading group could not be found.
The number of records to be transferred at one time:
Number of Records to be transferred at one time
Unable to retrieve GPS location information
Error occurred during user count check
Printed document number could not be updated!
Order Statuses are updated as Deliverable
Order Statuses are updated as Undeliverable
We need your permission to use app
We need your permission to use GPS
An error occurred when receiving user parameters!
Posting because you are not used to Version to Restore Old Version
The visit will be completed for the customer with the title %1s.
A visit will be initiated for the customer with the title %1s
More user definitions than the number of licenses have been detected, there must be as many user definitions as the number of licenses in order to log in to the application.
The hours of work are controlled. Please wait…
You can not create Invoice for E-Invoice customers
You do not have a MasterPass account
Receiving last transaction info of AR/AP cards
Receiving last transaction info of materials
